name: workflow
description: Reusable Codex workflow skills maintained from the my-codex repository.

interface.shortDescription: Use reusable workflow skills maintained in my-codex.
interface.longDescription: Workflow packages reusable Codex procedures for long-running goals, SOP execution harnesses, prompt/strategy loops, explicit subagent orchestration, and other repeatable agent workflows so they can be installed from the my-codex marketplace instead of being maintained directly under $CODEX_HOME/skills.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use my reusable Codex workflow skills.
